title: cheilanthes shirleyana
intro: Cheilanthes shirleyana, also known as the shrubby button fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cheilanthes shirleyana are said to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
